bead.title: bench-pr-A4a: concurrency pool, flock groups, and signal-driven shutdown in scripts/benchmark/benchmark
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The PR A bash runner at scripts/benchmark/benchmark must execute cells concurrently while honoring per-group serialization and must shut down cleanly on SIGINT/SIGTERM. Today cmd/bench/matrix.go:1 owns scheduling and there is no flock-based group lock, no setsid process-group tracking, and no escalation from SIGTERM to SIGKILL.

ROOT CAUSE
The parent scope at cmd/bench/matrix.go:1 (replaced by scripts/benchmark/benchmark) lacks a background-job pool capped by --jobs, lacks flock locking under ${FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR:-${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/fizeau-benchmark}/locks/<group>.lock, and lacks setsid-based process-group control needed for deterministic signal escalation.

PROPOSED FIX
In scripts/benchmark/benchmark add a background-job pool capped by --jobs. Acquire flock per concurrency group at ${FIZEAU_BENCH_STATE_DIR:-${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/fizeau-benchmark}/locks/<group>.lock so cells in the same group serialize while unrelated groups run concurrently. Start every cell under setsid and record its process group. On SIGINT/SIGTERM stop scheduling new cells, SIGTERM each in-flight process group, wait 30 seconds, then SIGKILL remaining process groups. Tests must use flock-sensitive workers and long-running cell stubs to verify behavior deterministically without requiring real Docker.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change planning semantics, adapter JSON contracts, or report composition except as required to integrate concurrent execution. Do not finalize the PR C bench-set schema. Do not implement the harbor-runner Docker wrapper or image build assets (covered by sibling A4b). Do not require real Docker in unit tests; mock docker where touched. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it. Governing artifact reference governing:plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification must remain. Parent/dependency ID fizeau-11e9c095 must remain traceable. Verification gates cd cli && go test ./... and lefthook run pre-commit are required.

AC
1. TestBenchmarkJobsLimit: run mode never has more than --jobs cells in flight.
2. TestBenchmarkConcurrencyGroupFlock: cells sharing a concurrency group serialize through the configured flock lock path, while unrelated groups may run concurrently.
3. TestBenchmarkSignalTerminatesProcessGroups: SIGINT/SIGTERM stops scheduling new cells, sends SIGTERM to each in-flight process group, waits, and escalates to SIGKILL after the configured timeout.
4. TestBenchmarkVerificationGatesA4a: cd cli && go test ./... passes.
5. TestBenchmarkLefthookGateA4a: lefthook run pre-commit passes.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestBenchmarkJobsLimit passes.
2. TestBenchmarkConcurrencyGroupFlock passes.
3. TestBenchmarkSignalTerminatesProcessGroups passes.
4. TestBenchmarkVerificationGatesA4a: cd cli && go test ./... passes.
5. TestBenchmarkLefthookGateA4a: lefthook run pre-commit passes.
